overall.description: A first-person perspective sequence in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing the player approaching an abandoned car under an overpass, entering and sitting inside the vehicle, then exiting and walking down a narrow industrial alleyway at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking area under concrete overpass

events.description: begins circling around the abandoned vehicle to examine it from different angles

agents.ego_description: circling around the abandoned sedan examining its condition and surroundings

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the vehicle holding a weapon

entered.detail: beat-up olive green sedan with visible rust damage and peeling paint
large concrete overhead structure providing shelter over the area
chain-link fence with metal posts running along the right side
abandoned orange couch sitting under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Under a concrete overpass at night, the camera circles a rusted abandoned sedan while an armed character stands guard nearby. An orange couch sits discarded in the background near a chain-link fence.

events.description: camera enters the vehicle interior through the open door

agents.ego_description: sitting inside the car observing the worn dashboard and the character visible through the windshield

notable_agents.action: visible through the windshield standing outside the vehicle

entered.detail: worn dashboard with stickers including an American flag decal
steering wheel with triangular logo in the center
worn fabric car seats with visible aging

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to the interior of the sedan, showing a detailed view of the worn dashboard, steering wheel, and fabric seats. Through the windshield, the armed character remains visible standing outside in the artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: exiting vehicle and departing the parking area

events.description: camera exits the vehicle and returns to exterior view
begins walking away from the vehicle toward the alley entrance

agents.ego_description: exiting the car and walking away from the parking area toward a narrow path

entered.detail: rear and side view of the abandoned sedan as camera moves away
abandoned orange couch now visible to the right of the path
concrete overpass structure now visible to the left
chain-link fence visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the vehicle and moves away from the parking area, showing the rear of the sedan and the orange couch. The concrete overpass structure looms overhead as the camera begins walking toward a narrow alley entrance.

events.description: enters the narrow alleyway leaving the parking area behind

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the narrow alleyway between industrial buildings

entered.detail: tall concrete industrial wall with graffiti and pipes running along the left side
metal chain-link fence running along the right side of the path
tall wooden utility pole with overhead wires extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow industrial alleyway with a dirt path flanked by a concrete building wall on the left and a chain-link fence on the right. Overhead wires stretch between utility poles as the camera walks deeper into the dimly lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate parking area under a concrete overpass into the depths of a narrow industrial alleyway at night. It begins by circling a rusted abandoned sedan and a discarded orange couch while an armed guard stands nearby under artificial lighting. The perspective then shifts seamlessly into the interior of the vehicle, focusing on the worn dashboard and fabric seats before looking back out through the windshield at the guard. As the camera exits the car, it moves away from the overpass structure and the sedan, turning toward a dark opening in the distance. The scene finally transitions into a dimly lit corridor, following a dirt path flanked by a concrete wall and a chain-link fence beneath a canopy of overhead utility wires.
